message:
extension_dispatcher: fix session hostcall test to drain pending work

The test dispatcher_session_hostcall_resolves_state_and_set_name was
flaky because it only called tick() once. Async hostcall promises may
need multiple ticks to resolve.

Fixes:
- Loop while runtime.has_pending() with tick + drain_microtasks
- Replace JS-based verification with direct global reads via with_ctx
- Use js_to_json to extract typed values for assertion
- More robust assertions using Rust equality checks

This ensures all 4 hostcall promises (get_state, get_file, get_name,
set_name) resolve before verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
